bargaining_unit_name: Fraternal Order of Police Newark, Lodge No. 12 (all police officers of the Newark Police Department, excluding managerial executives, craft and professional employees, superior officers, clerical employees, supervisors, linemen, teletype operators, police property clerks, and records/identification officers)
